metadata.title: Sneaking B Site for a Clean 2-Kill in VALORANT’s Mid Game
metadata.description:
Took a quiet route and caught them off guard on B. Timing and patience made all the difference in this quick play.
Who’s your favorite agent for sneaky flanks?

Drop a comment with your best flank plays!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
